title: Technical debt analysis: code and architecture
description: Conduct a thorough analysis of the codebase to identify technical debt across code quality, architecture, test coverage, dependency hygiene, and maintainability. Produce a prioritised findings report covering: areas of high complexity or poor separation of concerns, inconsistent patterns or duplicated logic, missing or insufficient test coverage, outdated or risky dependencies, and any architectural concerns that could hinder future development. For each finding include: location (file:line where applicable), severity (high/medium/low), description of the issue, and a suggested remediation approach.
